pages.text: Create speaks redstone fluently:$(br)$(li)$(bold)Redstone Link$() — wireless redstone between two points, addressed by item frequencies.$(li)$(bold)Threshold Switch$() — emits a signal based on how full a container or tank is; the heart of 'refill when low' loops.$(li)$(bold)Stockpile Switch$() — the same idea for a single block's stock.
pages.title: Signals

pages.text: $(bold)Showing data:$()$(br)$(li)$(bold)Display Link$() — reads a value (stock level, train station, kinetic speed, time) and writes it to a target.$(li)$(bold)Display Board$() — a big flip-board screen the link writes to.$(li)$(bold)Nixie Tubes$() — small numeric/letter displays.$(br2)Together these turn a factory into something you can read at a glance.
pages.title: Displays
